signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's Statistics Korea released Consumer Price Index data on April 2, 2026, confirming year-over-year **annual inflation** rose slightly to **2.16%** in March 2026 from 2.00% in February 2026 (monthly increase of 0.34%), with CPI at 118.8.[2]  
No breaking announcements since then (as of April 18, 2026) i
